decisions.title_en: Jensen Huang delivers GTC Taipei keynote: N1X laptop chip reveal, Vera Rubin NVL72, DLSS 5
decisions.reason: story_key seen in lookback (5-23 Huang lands in Taipei, 5-27 HQ groundbreaking x2). NEW: the actual GTC Taipei keynote happened today 6-1 at 11am Taipei time. First formal reveal of N1X ARM laptop SoC (MediaTek-designed 20-core ARM + Blackwell GPU 6144 CUDA cores, 180-200 TOPS, 128GB LPDDR5X), DLSS 5, Vera Rubin NVL72 partner/delivery news (tray assembly cut from 2h to 5min, 5x inference, 10x lower cost-per-token), surprise H2 product teased. Distinct from arrival/groundbreaking.

decisions.title_en: SpaceX (xAI-merged) IPO valuation resets to $1.8T floor ahead of June 8 roadshow
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. SpaceX (which absorbed xAI/Grok in Feb) reset its IPO valuation floor to $1.8T (down from >$2T April target); roadshow to begin June 8, pricing ~June 11, ticker SPCX, raising up to $75B. AI-relevant via xAI absorption.

decisions.title_en: Groq raising $650M from existing investors after Nvidia's $20B not-acqui-hire
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. AI inference chip startup Groq reportedly raising $650M, months after Nvidia's ~$20B not-an-acquisition licensing deal that pulled senior Groq staff to Nvidia.

decisions.title_en: AWS in talks to add SpaceXAI's Grok to Bedrock despite near-zero enterprise demand
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Business Insider exclusive: AWS in talks to add Grok to Bedrock; integration already done. Notable angle: Netskope data shows Grok enterprise usage peaked at 5/1000 users then fell to 2/1000.

decisions.title_en: SentinelOne cuts ~230 jobs (8%) framing layoffs as AI-driven productivity
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. SentinelOne cutting ~8% of workforce (~230 jobs) alongside Q1 FY27 earnings; CEO Tomer Weingarten cites AI productivity gains; weak guidance sent shares down ~8-12%.

decisions.title_en: GitHub Copilot transitions all plans to usage-based (token) billing today
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. The transition to usage-based metered billing for all Copilot plans takes effect today, June 1. Plans keep base prices but add AI Credit allotments; usage metered by input/output/cached tokens (1 credit = $0.01).
